capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a facilities management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a facilities management service?

questions.prompt: Is the facilities management service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the facilities management service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for facilities management?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for facilities management?

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for facilities management reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate are the KPIs and KRIs for facilities management reviewed at least quarterly?

capability_questions.capability_name: Controlled Access Points and Secure Area Authorization

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have the capability to control physical access to all data centers?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have the capability to control physical access to all data centers?
questions.evaluation_focus: Physical access control to data centers

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise separate functional zones physically?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise separate functional zones physically?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise employ accurate equipment identification to validate physical asset placements?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise employ accurate equipment identification to validate physical asset placements?
questions.evaluation_focus: Accurate equipment identification for asset placement

questions.prompt: Is equipment identification physically reviewed at least quarterly for accuracy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is equipment identification physically reviewed at least quarterly for accuracy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have surveillance at all data centers to identify and call out unauthorized or anomalous access?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have surveillance at all data centers to identify and call out unauthorized or anomalous access?
questions.evaluation_focus: Data center surveillance for unauthorized access

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have formal training on unauthorized access to data centers for all data center personnel?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have formal training on unauthorized access to data centers for all data center personnel?
questions.evaluation_focus: Formal unauthorized access training for DC personnel

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise ensure risk-based protection of power and telecommunication cables from the threat of interception, interference, or damage at all facilities, offices, and rooms?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise ensure risk-based protection of power and telecommunication cables from the threat of interception, interference, or damage at all facilities, offices, and rooms?
questions.evaluation_focus: Risk-based cabling protection at all facilities

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise implement and maintain data center environmental control systems that monitor, maintain, and test for continual effectiveness the temperature and humidity conditions within accepted industry standards?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise implement and maintain data center environmental control systems that monitor, maintain, and test for continual effectiveness the temperature and humidity conditions within accepted industry standards?
questions.evaluation_focus: Environmental monitoring and testing within industry standards

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise secure, monitor, maintain, and test utility services for continual effectiveness at planned intervals?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise secure, monitor, maintain, and test utility services for continual effectiveness at planned intervals?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise keep business-critical equipment away from locations subject to high probability for environmental risk events?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise keep business-critical equipment away from locations subject to high probability for environmental risk events?
questions.evaluation_focus: Business-critical equipment away from high environmental risk locations
